description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pamplejuce that runs on workflow dispatch, push, and pull request events. The workflow should run jobs in parallel on different machines for Linux, macOS, and Windows environments. For each environment, it should set up the necessary dependencies, cache and install Intel IPP on Windows, configure and build the project using CMake and Ninja, run tests, and validate plugins using pluginval. Additionally, it should codesign and notarize macOS artifacts, and upload build artifacts to GitHub Releases on tag creation.
